meaning: adj.伸出的,延长的,广大的,扩大范围的,长期的
examples: The show has been extended for another six weeks.
The oil well extended several hundreds of feet in depth.
Defence planners predict an extended period of retrenchment.
This can be extended to such religious virtues as loyalty, justice, generosity and compassion.
Once the project is completed, performances will increase and museum opening hours will be extended.
